allowed_transitions.gate: challenger/OOD pass, runtime canary pass, rollback plan present, zero failure metrics
rollback trigger, output regression, or safety failure
primary regression and legacy rollback replay pass
lineage resolved, scope named, OOD/canary pass
extended no-unique-coverage proof, rollback no longer required, archive snapshot present

hard_blocks: No destructive delete in primary/secondary governance.
No operator may have zero primary variants.
No operator may have more than one primary variant.
No secondary may be unlinked from an operator primary.
No challenger may become primary without challenger/OOD evidence.
No abstract lineage hold may become primary without lineage resolution.

states.primary_abstract_current: Current abstract kernel retained while lineage is resolved.
states.primary_active: Default selected variant for runtime overlay.
states.primary_current: Current legacy/default variant retained while challenger candidate waits.
states.retired_redundant: Inactive archived variant after redundancy and rollback-not-needed proof.
states.secondary_challenger: Candidate variant held until challenger/OOD proof.
states.secondary_lineage_hold: Abstract candidate held until lineage/name/scope proof.
states.secondary_rollback: Legacy variant retained for rollback and shadow comparison.
